    SemisequentChangeInfo.modifiedFormulas()
    returns the list of all modification positions
    ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo>
    SequentChangeInfo.modifiedFormulas()
    The formulas modified within the sequent are returned as a concatenated list of the formulas modified within each semisequent.

    The formulas modified within one of the semisequents are returned.
